description: You are a Climate Data Scientist at NASA's Goddard Space Flight Center. Configure GPredict to monitor the A-Train Earth Observing Constellation. Remove the default 'Amateur' module and add a ground station named 'GSFC_Goddard' (38.9951°N, 76.8505°W, 50m altitude). Create a tracking module named 'A_Train' bound to the 'GSFC_Goddard' ground station that tracks AQUA (NORAD 27424), AURA (28376), OCO-2 (40059), and GCOM-W1 / SHIZUKU (38337). Enable the display of satellite ground tracks on the map. Login: username 'ga', password 'password123'.
